title: onoclea procera
intro: Onoclea procera, also known as the tall fern or ostrich fern, is a type of flowering plant in the Osmundaceae family. The medicinal properties of Onoclea procera lie in its fiddleheads, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Onoclea procera can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
